description: Composition   Black knitted cap made of 90% cotton and 10% acrylic, has grey print, a fluffy bobble on top, ribbed hemline and brand label on the hemline FitRegularWash careWash inside out separately using mild detergentDo not bleachDrip dry in shade Stay warm when the chill strikes in this simple knitted cap from united colors of benetton.  Team this with jeans, a polo sweater, a jacket and ankle boots.
